payload.text: I’ll inspect the current renderer and tests first, then patch the modal structure and markdown tab behavior in the smallest renderer-focused scope. Since this is tightly coupled UI work, I’ll keep it local unless I find an independent test/update task worth delegating.

I found the current modal still has the header inside the primary scroll container and the update composer in the sidebar. I’m going to move the header to the modal grid, move the composer below markdown, and convert the right pane’s details/activity wrappers to flat sections while preserving their existing handlers.

The main structural patch is in place: the header is now outside the scrollable layout, the Request Changes shortcut path is removed, and the update composer is under the markdown area. I’m doing a syntax-level pass now because this file had existing uncommitted changes and the JSX move was sizeable.

The static checks now show the old `Request Changes` path and boxed details class are gone. I’m going to run the focused UI test first, then the ticket’s required full `npm test` and typecheck.

{
  "name": "relay",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "description": "Local-first Codex-driven kanban desktop app.",
  "main": "./out/main/index.js",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "electron-vite dev",
    "dev:logs": "electron-vite dev 2>&1 | tee /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "build": "tsc --noEmit && electron-vite build",
    "clean:dist": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs --clean",
    "package:binary": "node scripts/package-electron.mjs",
    "dist": "npm run clean:dist && npm run build && npm run package:binary",
    "logs": "mkdir -p \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay\" && touch \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\" && tail -n 200 -f \"$HOME/Library/Application Support/relay/relay.log\"",
    "logs:dev": "touch /tmp/relay-dev.log && tail -n 200 -f /tmp/relay-dev.log",
    "preview": "electron-vite preview",
    "test": "node tests/run-tests.mjs",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1",
    "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0",
    "@dnd-kit/utilities": "^3.2.2",
    "@openai/codex-sdk": "^0.130.0",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "effect": "4.0.0-beta.65",
    "gray-matter": "^4.0.3",
    "lucide-react": "^0.468.0",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "ulid": "^2.3.0"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^22.10.2",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.2",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.2",
    "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.3.4",
    "electron": "^33.2.1",
    "electron-vite": "^2.3.0",
    "typescript": "^5.7.2",
    "vite": "^5.4.11"
  }
}

The test runner passed with 138 tests even when invoked with the focused test path; it appears the project runner still executes the full suite. I’ll still run the exact commands from the ticket so the final result is unambiguous.
`npm test` passed all 138 tests. I’m running `npm run typecheck` next; after that I’ll start the dev server for manual inspection unless the typecheck exposes a regression.

Summary of changes made:
- Moved the ticket detail title/status/close controls into a non-scrolling modal header with dialog labelling preserved.
- Kept desktop two-pane layout, made the modal body scroll beneath the header, and flattened Details/Agent Activity styling.
- Moved Agent Ticket Update composer under the markdown area and removed the top-level `Request Changes` helper/button.
- Added collapsed-by-default markdown preview with expand/collapse icon control and expanded preview state reset per ticket.
- Updated markdown tab UI tests for collapsed and expanded preview modes.

Files changed:
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`

Commands run:
- Inspection: `sed`, `grep`, `cat package.json`, `git status --short`, `git diff`
- `npm test -- tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `npm test`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `git diff --check -- src/renderer/src/App.tsx src/renderer/src/styles.css tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `npm run dev`
- `npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1`
- `HOST=127.0.0.1 npm run dev`

Tests run and results:
- `npm test -- tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`: passed, 138 tests.
- `npm test`: passed, 138 tests.
- `npm run typecheck`: passed.
- `git diff --check`: passed.

Subagent usage: none used.

Remaining risks/follow-up:
- Manual `npm run dev` validation was blocked by the sandbox: Electron/Vite failed to bind `::1:5173` with `EPERM`. Main and preload builds completed before the dev server bind failure. Forcing `--host` is unsupported by `electron-vite`, and `HOST=127.0.0.1` still attempted `::1`.
- Worktree had unrelated pre-existing modifications before this task; I left them untouched.

payload.finalResponse:
Summary of changes made:
- Moved the ticket detail title/status/close controls into a non-scrolling modal header with dialog labelling preserved.
- Kept desktop two-pane layout, made the modal body scroll beneath the header, and flattened Details/Agent Activity styling.
- Moved Agent Ticket Update composer under the markdown area and removed the top-level `Request Changes` helper/button.
- Added collapsed-by-default markdown preview with expand/collapse icon control and expanded preview state reset per ticket.
- Updated markdown tab UI tests for collapsed and expanded preview modes.

Files changed:
- `src/renderer/src/App.tsx`
- `src/renderer/src/styles.css`
- `tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`

Commands run:
- Inspection: `sed`, `grep`, `cat package.json`, `git status --short`, `git diff`
- `npm test -- tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `npm test`

- `git diff --check -- src/renderer/src/App.tsx src/renderer/src/styles.css tests/ticket-draft-ui.test.tsx`
- `npm run dev`

- `HOST=127.0.0.1 npm run dev`

- `npm test`: passed, 138 tests.

- `git diff --check`: passed.

Remaining risks/follow-up:
- Manual `npm run dev` validation was blocked by the sandbox: Electron/Vite failed to bind `::1:5173` with `EPERM`. Main and preload builds completed before the dev server bind failure. Forcing `--host` is unsupported by `electron-vite`, and `HOST=127.0.0.1` still attempted `::1`.
- Worktree had unrelated pre-existing modifications before this task; I left them untouched.
